title: Varna in Bloom: Where flowers dream
desc: Varna in Bloom is a blooming fantasy destination where flowers and stories grow side by side. Books are woven throughout the landscape alongside flowering paths, hidden portals, and details that reward the curious explorer. It sits at the edge of a story: beautiful, a little dreamlike, and worth getting lost in. Popular with photographers, couples, and anyone who has ever wanted to fall into a good book.

title: Mount Campion Caves National Forest
desc: Mount Campion Caves National Forest is over 150,000 sq meters of beautiful parkland, landscaped to look like a natural mountain park. It has the largest natural caves and caverns. Above ground are miles of scenic trails through natural canyons and forests. There is hiking, horseback riding, camping, and photography. and cabin rentals. Located on the slopes of Mount Campion, the highest mountain in SL on the beautiful Heterocera mainland continent. You can roam for weeks!

title: Luminara
desc: Luminara is a space created with care, where every detail holds a deeper meaning if you’re open to it. You’ll find mirrors, keys, and other interactive elements designed to spark reflection; alongside peaceful surroundings meant to calm the mind. Whether you uncover deeper insights or simply enjoy the beauty of nature, may your time here feel meaningful in its own way.

title: Ancient Order of Centaurs
desc: The Ancient Order of Centaurs is a beautiful, and varied region where centaurs and their friends can feel at home. Visitors are very welcome, whether they are centaurs, creatures, and even hoomans. Come explore, join the community, or just take photos of the lovely scenery.

title: Kona Beach and Surfing
desc: Welcome to Kona Beach! Catch the waves, shop, play, and soak up the sun. Then dive in and explore a magical underwater world, home to mermaids and mermen.

title: Grand Harbor Isle
desc: Grand Harbor Isle is a scenic, car-free coastal destination set in Lake Serene. Designed for exploration and relaxation, the island features a detailed waterfront town, forest trails, waterfalls, beaches, and elevated viewpoints throughout. Visitors can explore by foot, bike, or horse, with rezers available across the region. The town includes a mix of storefronts, apartments, and rental homes, along with the Grand Harbor Hotel for short stays. A central Welcome Center provides information on rentals, hotel availability, and key landmarks. Grand Harbor Isle is ideal for photography, casual exploration, and social visits. No roleplay is required, though light roleplay is welcome.

title: The Theater at LeLoo's World Mainland
desc: As the season warms, step into a sunlit world where fantasy blooms across the land. Follow the winding path to a charming open‑air theater, or wander down to the Lake to enjoy rideable swans and delightful pose props—perfect for capturing memories touched with a hint of magic. Please use the following settings for the best viewer experience: use Shared Environment for both Sky & Water, check the box for Transparent Water, turn on sounds, and set the draw distance to 150+. Everyone is welcome to this PG event! Don't forget to share your photos in the Flickr group: flickr.com/groups/leloosworld

title: Palazzo Park
desc: Searching for excitement in your Second life? Look no further than Palazzo Park! The ultimate in fun and entertainment, boasting a wide array of activities for family and friends! Enjoy laser tag, bowling, a movie theater with syncing screens, an arcade, billiards, a game lounge, live entertainment, and more! It is voice-enabled and MyStory compatible.

title: Lost Unicorn
desc: A dreamy, beautiful and mystical Elven realm shrouded in mist and magic. The forest is home to fairies, centaurs, unicorns, and much abundant wildlife. Grab your loved ones for a stroll, explore to your heart's content, or bring your camera to take stunning pictures. The numerous hidden spots are also perfect for relaxing. Can you find them all?

title: Rain Village at Oddly Japan
desc: Oddly Japan’s Rain Village is a living echo of a world inspired by Naruto, but it tells its own story. The rain never quite stops here. It gathers on steel rooftops, drips from cables strung between towering structures, and reflects a skyline shaped by conflict and survival. Neon glows through mist. Paper lanterns flicker against cold metal. It feels like a hidden village that endured too much and refused to fall. It’s built to be seen. Every corner is photographic, every angle a frame. Wander the alleys, cross the high walkways, watch the rain from above, or just exist here with friends. A train cuts through the silence. Shops hum quietly. Beneath it all, something pulses in the dark.

title: Circle Mental Health HQ
desc: Circle Mental Health is a Peer Support Group. They are here to give help and support to those struggling with a wide range of mental health issues. It's okay to struggle, and they, as a community, are there and listening! Join their group for more information. They offer weekly Support Meetings and 1-2-1 Mentoring. All of their services are free!

title: The Lighthouse
desc: The Lighthouse is a support group and meeting place, focused on mental health and wellness. They provide support group meetings on topics including depression, anxiety, and addiction, as well as social activities and meditation sessions. They are a laid-back peer support community where you can connect with like-minded people.

title: BADU - VIETNAM
desc: Explore the beauty of Vietnam, Asharhia's new destination, inspired by the iconic Golden Bridge. Walk across the famous golden pathway held by giant hands, surrounded by mountains and lush scenery. Perfect for relaxing, exploring, and taking photos.

title: Mindful Cove
desc: Mindful Cove exists to provide both an entry point into Second Life, and an ongoing community region for newcomers and long-time residents alike, based on the core principle that SL can be an excellent place to engage in activities that support emotional and mental well-being.

title: TheNest - Sunbird Emberwood
desc: Welcome to TheNest Sunbird Emberwood, a quiet forest village where time slows and a hint of magic lingers. Wander freely, lose yourself among the trees, and let dusk lead the way.

title: Everwild Resort & Spa
desc: Everwild Resort and Spa is where luxury meets wild adventure. Set in a lush, tropical-inspired escape, Everwild blends high-end relaxation with unforgettable experiences. Unwind in the spa and wellness centre with soothing treatments, steam rooms, and tranquil spaces designed to melt everything away. Stay in one of the family-friendly themed lodges or enjoy a romantic hideaway designed for couples.

title: Cica's Happy Planet TilfypLI
desc: "We don't create a fantasy world to escape reality. We create it to be able to stay." - Lynda Barry

title: Cerrado Cove
desc: A new adventure awaits at Cerrado Cove in the Sailors Cove Rainforest! Discover a charming fishing village, nestled deep within a lush tropical rainforest. This quaint waterfront community offers boat slips and cozy homes for rent, perfect for those seeking a peaceful escape with a touch of wild beauty. Keep an eye out for local wildlife—including alligators—and, if you explore carefully, you might even stumble upon a hidden moonshiner’s home tucked away among the trees. Come experience the mystery, nature, and quiet charm.

title: Illuminating Machinima at SLEA
desc: Calling all machinima artists! Step into SLVCG's 2nd Annual Illuminating Machinima at SLEA, a full region designed as a cinematic playground, featuring four unique, genre-themed environments by talented designers and artists. Explore a haunted swamp, a vibrant waterfront skate park, an anime-inspired toon land, and a neon-lit Neo Japan city. Capture your next story and bring your vision to life!

title: Lakesong Meadow xIZqAecG
desc: Welcome to Lakesong Meadow, where dreams blossom, and every experience is uniquely yours! Nestled in a breathtaking landscape of serene waters, lush gardens, and tranquil beauty, Lakesong Meadow is more than a destination; it is an experience designed to inspire, nurture, and enchant. From the moment you arrive, you are embraced by an atmosphere of elegance, warmth, and timeless charm. It also offers a romantic setting for weddings, ceremonies, and romantic getaways by the water.

title: Ordinary day by Cica Ghost ctsEBloK
desc: Q: What do you say to your cat when you go out? A: Have a mice day!

title: The Forest of Hours
desc: The Forest of Hours, located in the region Scape, features a vast forest with trails, caves, and fun things to discover. The entire area is open to the public. On the west, The Forest of Hours seamlessly connects with Cael Ystafell in the region Echo, with even more verdant woods to explore! New resident friendly!

title: Burrow Coffee Co EMAKUvQj
desc: Since 2009, Burrow Coffee Co. has been a cherished gathering spot on the Second Life Grid. It blends urban charm with warm elegance. Enjoy expertly brewed coffee, DJs and musicians, and a vibrant atmosphere perfect for connection, creativity, or quiet escapes. More than a café, Burrow is a home for community, music, and unforgettable memories.

title: The Wylde
desc: Welcome to The Wylde. Be gentle, be kind, find peace. Come wander the forest trails, dance in the grassy meadow. Find comfy places to sit and relax, to cuddle, to chat with friends. Explore the watchtower and the observatory. Search for the magical cavern and the hidden grotto.
